name: Honey Mustard-Soy Vinaigrette
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized bowl, blend the honey mustard, soy sauce and vinegar until smooth.
2. Whisk in the vegetable oil in a slow, steady stream.
3. Add the chopped fresh dill if desired.
4. Serve with shredded Savoy cabbage, thinly sliced zucchini, and diced tomatoes, or use this vinaigrette in any other salad of your choice.
Makes 1 1/2 Cups
